---
title: ''
output:
  html_document: default
  pdf_document: default
---

```{r sample, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

Parameter <- c(
  "psi1_0", 
  "sigma_psi_species",
  "sigma_psi_city",
  "mu_psi_park_size",
  "sigma_psi_park_size",
  "mu_psi_tree_cover",
  "sigma_psi_tree_cover",
  "mu_psi_plant_diversity",
  "sigma_psi_plant_diversity",
  "mu_psi_isolation",
  "sigma_psi_isolation",
  "mu_psi_landscape_herbaceous",
  "sigma_psi_landscape_herbaceous",
  "mu_psi_landscape_woody",
  "sigma_psi_landscape_woody",
  "psi_wingspan", 
  "psi_migratory", 
  
  "p0", 
  "sigma_p_species",
  "sigma_p_city",
  "p_total_detections",
  "p_wingspan",
  "p_feature_diversity",
  "p_ease_of_id",
  "delta0",
  "delta_regional_cluster",
  "sigma_p_species_date",
  "epsilon0",
  "epsilon_regional_cluster",
  "sigma_p_species_date_sq"
)

Prior <- c(
  "Normal(0, 1)", 
  "Half-Normal(0, 1)",
  "Half-Normal(0, 0.5)",
  "Normal(0, 2)",
  "Half-Normal(0, 0.5)",
  "Normal(0, 2)",
  "Half-Normal(0, 0.5)",
  "Normal(0, 2)",
  "Half-Normal(0, 0.5)",
  "Normal(0, 2)",
  "Half-Normal(0, 0.5)",
  "Normal(0, 2)",
  "Half-Normal(0, 0.5)",
  "Normal(0, 2)",
  "Half-Normal(0, 0.5)",
  "Normal(0, 0.5)",
  "Normal(0, 0.5)",
  
  "Normal(0, 1)", 
  "Half-Normal(0, 1)",
  "Half-Normal(0, 0.5)",
  "Normal(0, 1)", 
  "Normal(0, 1)",
  "Normal(0, 1)",
  "Normal(0, 1)",
  "Normal(0, 2)",
  "Normal(0, 1)",
  "Normal(0, 2)",
  "Normal(0, 1)",
  "Normal(0, 0.5)",
  "Normal(0, 1)"
)

df <- as.data.frame(cbind(Parameter, Prior))

t1 <- df[1:15,]
rownames(t1) <- NULL
t2 <- df[16:30,]
rownames(t2) <- NULL
#knitr::kable(list(t1, t2))

library(tinytex)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

#t1 <- kable( df[1:20,], format = "latex", booktabs = TRUE)
#t2 <- kable( df[21:40,], format = "latex", booktabs = TRUE)
	
t1 %>%
  kable("html", align = 'clc') %>%
    kable_styling(full_width = F, position = "float_left")
 
t2 %>%
  kable("html", align = 'clc') %>%
    kable_styling(full_width = F, position = "right")

```
